# Jenifer Ciuciu-Kiss

> Personal website of Jenifer Tabita Ciuciu-Kiss, an AI engineer and PhD researcher working on knowledge graphs, ontology engineering, data engineering, research software, and intelligent systems.

Site: https://jeniferciuciukiss.com

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://jeniferciuciukiss.com/): Overview, featured work, writing, and contact paths.
- [Projects](https://jeniferciuciukiss.com/projects/): Selected work in knowledge graphs, ontology engineering, data systems, research software, automation, and web development.
- [Publications](https://jeniferciuciukiss.com/publications/): Research publications on research software, scientific knowledge graphs, ontology infrastructure, NLP, and semantic program analysis.
- [Blog](https://jeniferciuciukiss.com/blog/): Technical writing and project notes.
- [About](https://jeniferciuciukiss.com/about/): Biography, experience, education, skills, and interests.
- [Contact](https://jeniferciuciukiss.com/contact/): Project request and contact form.

## Content Areas

- Projects cover product, data, automation, and website work.
- Publications include journal articles, conference papers, workshop papers, reports, and thesis work.
- Blog posts cover AI, knowledge systems, research software, document processing, and open-source practice.

## Research Profiles

- GitHub: https://github.com/kuefmz
- Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=G86xVZ0AAAAJ&hl=en
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3170-6730
- ResearchGate: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Jenifer-Ciuciu-Kiss

## Use Guidance

- Cite pages by their canonical URLs when referencing content from this site.
- Prefer project, publication, and blog detail pages for specific claims.
- Do not treat the contact or newsletter forms as content sources.
